entries.desc: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.

Charge to your target and deal 43 Fire damage.

Generates 15 Fury.

Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.
Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.
Increases maximum Fury by 20.
The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.
Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.
Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.
Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.
You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.
Unleash an eruption of fel energy, dealing 9 Chaos damage and stunning all nearby enemies for 3 sec.
Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.
Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.
Increases your chance to parry by 3%.
The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.
Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.
Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.
Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.
Shift gains an additional charge.
Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.
Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.
Mastery increases your movement speed.

Leech increased by 6%.

Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.
Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.
Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer 4 Fire damage.
Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.
Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.
Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.
Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.
Your movement speed is increased by 3%.
Increases maximum health by 3%.
Increases your mastery by 2.6%.
Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.
Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.
Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.
The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.
Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.
Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.
Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.
Glide speed increased by 10%.
Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.
Blur gains 1 additional charge.
Unleash the fel within you, damaging enemies directly in front of you for 159 Fire damage over 2 sec.
Consume up to 5 Soul Fragments then explode, dealing 71 Fire damage to nearby enemies, increased by 20% per fragment consumed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.
Brand yourself and an enemy target with demonic symbols, reducing the damage you take by 40% and instantly dealing 146 Fire damage to the enemy.
Reduces the cooldown of Fracture by 1 sec and Throw Glaive by 6 sec.
Your Sigils activate 1 second faster.
Sigil of Flame damage increased by 50%.
Physical damage increased by 12%.
Demon Spikes reduces damage taken by 5% while active.
Fel Devastation heals you for up to 50% more, based on your missing health.

Place a Sigil of Silence at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Silences all enemies affected by the sigil for 2 sec.
While Demon Spikes is active, melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take 10 Physical damage. Generates high threat.
Activating Infernal Strike out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat places a Sigil of Flame at the target location.

Place a demonic sigil at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Detonates to deal 241 Chaos damage and shatter up to 3 Soul Fragments from enemies affected by the sigil. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.
Immolation Aura increases your movement speed by 10% and its duration is increased by 50%.
Every 20 Fury spent reduces the remaining cooldown of Demon Spikes by 1.00 sec.
Fire damage increased by 8%.

5.0% of your Fire damage shields you, up to a maximum of 3,055.

Shield and maximum values are doubled while Fiery Brand is active.

Enemies struck by Sigil of Flame, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb are afflicted with Frailty for 8 sec.

You heal for 8% of all damage you deal to targets with Frailty.
Soul Cleave heals for an additional 63.
Immolation Aura's initial burst has a chance to shatter Soul Fragments from enemies.
Fel Devastation heals for an additional 10%, and 50% of its healing is converted into an absorb shield for 10 sec.

Immolation Aura has 10% increased critical strike chance and generates 1-5 Fury when it deals critical damage.

This effect may only occur once per 1 sec.
Spirit Bomb shields you for 10 sec, absorbing 2,444 damage plus 611 for each Soul Fragment consumed.
Afflicting an enemy with a Sigil generates 1 Soul Fragment.
You take 10% reduced magic damage while Immolation Aura is active.
Frailty now also reduces all damage you take from afflicted targets by 5%.
Consuming a Soul Fragment reduces all damage you take by 3% for 8 sec.

Place a Sigil of Chains at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

All enemies affected by the sigil are pulled to its center and are snared, reducing movement speed by 70% for 6 sec.
Fiery Brand also increases Fire damage you deal to the target by 15%.
Increases the duration of your Sigils by 2 sec and radius by 2 yds.
Soul Cleave deals 60% increased damage to your primary target.
When consuming a Soul Fragment would heal you above full health it shields you instead, up to a maximum of 3,055.
Fel Devastation damage increased by 30%.
Every 1 sec, Fiery Brand spreads to one nearby enemy.
Your Sigils have 15% reduced cooldowns.
Frailty now also increases all damage you deal to afflicted targets by 3%.
Metamorphosis has 5 sec increased duration and increases the damage of Fracture, Soul Cleave, and Spirit Bomb by 20%.
Immolation Aura damage increases the duration of your Fiery Brand and Sigil of Flame by 0.25 sec.
The effects of Frailty are doubled.

Carve into the soul of your target, dealing 171 Fire damage and an additional 104 Fire damage over 3 sec.  Immediately shatters 3 Soul Fragments from the target and 1 additional Soul Fragment every 1 sec.

Sustaining fatal damage instead transforms you to Metamorphosis form.

This may occur once every 8 min.
When Fel Devastation finishes fully channeling, it refreshes 15-30% of its cooldown and refunds 15-30 Fury.
Fiery Brand has 12 sec reduced cooldown and 1 additional charge.
Soul Cleave and Spirit Bomb have a chance per soul fragment consumed to grant Untethered Rage, allowing Metamorphosis to be cast without incurring its cooldown and lasting 10 sec.
Soul Cleave deals 10% increased damage.
Felblade surrounds you with a Blade Ward, reducing damage taken by 10% for 5 sec.
Each Soul Fragment you consume shields you for an additional 15% of the amount healed.

Expose weaknesses in the target of your Reaver's Mark, causing your Physical damage to any enemy to also deal 30% of the damage dealt to your marked target as Chaos, and sometimes shatter a Soul Fragment.

When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Soul Cleave casts 3 additional glaive slashes to nearby targets. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

If cast after Shear, cast 6 slashes instead.

When enhanced by Reaver's Glaive, Shear applies Reaver's Mark, which causes the target to take 7% increased damage for 20 sec. Max 2 stacks.

Applies 1 additional stack of Reaver's Mark If cast after Soul Cleave.

Fury of the Aldrachi further empowers Blade Dance when cast after Chaos Strike, increasing slashes to 12.

Reaver's Mark now stacks up to 2 times and further empowers Chaos Strike when cast after Blade Dance, applying an additional stack.
Reaver's Glaive generates 20 Fury.
Throw Glaive deals 7 Physical damage to enemies near its initial target.
Vengeful Retreat can be cast a second time within 3 sec.
Vengeful Retreat resets the cooldown of Felblade.
The second enhanced ability in a pattern shatters an additional Soul Fragment.

Consuming 20 Soul Fragments or casting Sigil of Spite converts your next Throw Glaive into Reaver's Glaive.

 Reaver's Glaive: 
Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing 134 Physical damage and ricocheting to 2 additional enemies.
 
Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next Shear and Soul Cleave.

The enhanced ability you cast first deals 10% increased damage, and the second deals 20% increased damage.
After consuming both enhancements, gain Thrill of the Fight, increasing the damage of your next Reaver's Glaive by 30% and increasing Haste by 8% for 30 sec.
Consuming a Soul Fragment causes your next Shear to deal 21 additional Physical damage.
Reaver's Glaive damage is increased by 20% and other Physical-only damage is increased by 10%.
The Hunt shatters 1 Soul Fragment. Blade Dance and Chaos Strike have a 15% chance to shatter a Soul Fragment.
The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.

Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.
Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 2,307 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.
Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.
While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.
Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.
Shift has 1 additional charge.

Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 674 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.
Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.
Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.
Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.
Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.
